queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how negative checking account balances contribute to credit default probability and serve as key determinants of default.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Investigation into how the absence of a checking account functions as a credit risk driver and correlates with increased default likelihood.
Empirical evaluation of loan duration as a mitigating factor in credit risk assessment and its effect on reducing borrower default probability.
